data.text: Hello, hello, hello. Namaskar Sir, Shubham speaking from No Brokerhood application. Very good evening Sir. Sir, your society called regarding Ashwari Guru Shankul, LIG09. For which you had done a registration on No Brokerhood application as society treasurer. Yes Sir. So, once Sir, you will confirm what service you wanted to check for society. Sir, you were checking maintenance collection or bill generation or service check, sir? Or gate management? Actually, what happened is that our society has not been formed yet. That's why we haven't done any process yet. Our society has not been formed yet. Okay. So, we were asking for that. But now, what is it? How are you? I mean, it's good. Okay. So, where will your society be located now, sir? It is in Kaloja, Panvel. Near Panvel. Nearby Panvel One second I will check Aswari, Gurusankul, Gate No. 3, Sector 27, correct sir? Yes Taloja, Phase 2, Navi Mumbai PIN code is 410208 Exactly, that is your society's IT companies, sector 26. Okay. Okay. So, sir, if I tell you about No Brokerhood, No Brokerhood basically provides two types of services in the society. One is for gate management the other is for accounting management Okay So for gate management any entry and exit in the society whether it is guests visitors or delivery boys any entry and exit is moved done through a digital platform This improves the security of the society in a better way Second is accounting management. Through which, the maintenance collection, bill generation, deposit reception, etc. are done. This particular accounting module helps out. Sir, what will be the total number of flats in the society? The society will be flat around 560 or 540? 540 Ok, just give me a moment sir Is the committee formation an open process or has there been a handover from the builder side? No, there has not been a handover Ok, how much time will it take for the society to handover? It will take around December Okay, next two, three months you will have this handover part of society. I don't know if it will be a handover or not, but the registration process will be completed. Okay, the registration process will be completed. Okay, so sir, you can check the gate management module without society registration. You can take it and check its demonstration. You can check it once. Okay, so sir, you will get an idea that our gate management module, how it is useful for society, how it is useful for society. You can implement it. like 540 flats in the society so like no no, the 540 or 560 flats of the tanki are going to come in the society but initially we were checking for our building ok, so how many flats are there in your building sir? 84 84 flats ok, so according to your building you can take it for 84 flats In this, the entry and exit of your building will be done through this particular module, the gate management module, which will be mounted on it. This will improve the security services even better. Plus, this also happens with gate management. Suppose a guest comes here all the things are being mentioned on the manual register and all the things are based out on the register entry correct sir Yes sir Okay So suppose if a guest comes suppose he is going to another flat or building but he is not sure which building it is, so he mistakenly put your building number, your flat number or someone's flat number in your building. But he knows that he has to go to this building, but he doesn't know the name of the building. The other thing is that the security services of the society get compromised. But how will it be through our application? Suppose a guest is coming to your house in the society. You can already give them a pre-intimation card. Suppose someone comes to your society. He told me that I have to meet him, I have to go to this building and meet him. This is the flat number. So if our application is installed in your house, then immediately the security guard can take approval from you by connecting an intercom call. you can check if there is any guest coming in, if you want to deny or allow their entry you can use it that way so what will happen is that the security services of the society, especially in your building, will not be compromised for which our team has provided a small demonstration what is our product, how it can be implemented in your building, how residents can use it and how you as an admin can use it so for that also a small demonstration is provided from our side We will confirm the availability for 10-15 minutes so that we can arrange it with the team. Will it be an online demo or? Online, online, virtually sir. It will be on Google Meet. If it is available now, we can check it. But we will have to ask the rest of the people. Okay, so one more thing will be there, sir. For example, this will be a recorded session. Okay, the demonstration you will take will be a completely recorded session. So you can share that recording with your other society members. and then if you want to implement it with the product, you can also check the other members of the society's demonstration. Okay. Yes. If you are available, I will arrange a demonstration for you immediately, which will be a completely recorded session. Okay Yes Okay But the second thing is how how will the charges be As per your requirement our product team will explain you regarding this That the quotation will be given, they will provide you with the proper quotation which will be completely negotiable. It is not that the quotation will be provided from the team side, it will be fixed quotation. As per the society requirement and as per your building budget, you can negotiate it. Okay. Okay. Yes. Yes. So, once, once, once, we will confirm your contact number and mail ID, sir. Yes. Yes. 9-double-0-4-2-6-8-1-4-8. 9-double-0-4-2-6-8-4-2-6-8. 1-4-8. 1-4-8. Okay. 1-4-8. Yes. Yes. 1-4-8. 9-double-0-4-2-6-8-1-4-8. 1-4-8. Okay. And we will confirm your mail ID, sir. 1-b. S-A-N-D-S-A-N-D-E-E-P-E-E-T-K-D-0-8-2-K-D-0-8-2-at-the-rate-gmail.com at-the-rate-gmail.com I am repeating it once again, sir. S-A-N-D-E-E-T-E-K-D-0-8-2-at-the-rate-gmail.com Correct, sir? Yes. Okay, and our meeting will start at 5.25, so it will be fine, sir, like the demonstration call. I will try to join the recording session as well. Yes, you will share the link on Google Meet, sir. When I share the link, you can put it in your social media group. You can put it in that. All the members who are available can join. If there is a recorded session, you can share the recording with those who are not able to join. Okay, so I will get this recording on mail. Yes, I will provide you access to it, sir. Okay, thank you, sir. Thank you, sir. So, give me five minutes of your time. I am sharing your Google invite. Okay. Thank you so much, sir. You're welcome.
